---
# VARIANT — numeric superscript affiliations. Same body as
# template.qmd; differs only in the title-block partial.
title: "Your paper title here"
title-footnote: |
  Footnote attached to the title.
author:
  - name: First Author
    acknowledgements: |
      Corresponding author. Per-author thanks.
    affiliations:
      - ref: aff1
      - ref: aff2
  - name: Second Author
    affiliations:
      - ref: aff2
affiliations:
  - id: aff1
    name: University X
    department: Department of Economics
  - id: aff2
    name: University Y
    department: Department of Finance
abstract: |
  Your abstract.
keywords:
  - keyword1
  - keyword2
date: last-modified

multibib-bibliography:
  main: refs-main.bib
  appendix: refs-appendix.bib

format:
  econ-paper-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
    # Swap the default AEA-style title block for a numeric-superscript
    # one (First Author^{1,2}  Second Author^{2} + numbered list).
    template-partials:
      - _extensions/fikrurizal/econ-paper/partials/before-body-numeric.tex
  econ-paper-html: default
  econ-paper-docx: default
---

{{< include sections/_main.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include sections/_appendix.qmd >}}
